item.description: NBC News projects that Trump-backed candidate Ken Paxton has defeated Sen. John Cornyn in the Republican Senate primary runoff in Texas. NBC News’ Steve Kornacki breaks down the vote numbers and Ryan Chandler reports from Cornyn’s election headquarters.

media:content.media:title: Ken Paxton wins Republican Senate primary in Texas
media:content.media:description: NBC News projects that Trump-backed candidate Ken Paxton has defeated Sen. John Cornyn in the Republican Senate primary runoff in Texas. NBC News’ Steve Kornacki breaks down the vote numbers and Ryan Chandler reports from Cornyn’s election headquarters.

item.title: Ken Paxton wins Republican Senate primary in Texas

item.dc:creator: Henry J. Gomez
item.description: Vance spoke to NBC News in an interview that touched on Iran, Secretary of State Marco Rubio and the “anti-weaponization fund.”

media:content.media:text: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio, US Second Lady Usha Vance and US Vice President JD Vance attend an arrival ceremony for the British King and Queen on the South Lawn of the White House in Washington, DC, on April 28, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio, second lady Usha Vance and Vice President JD Vance on the South Lawn of the White House last month.

item.title: Vance opens up about his faith journey — and Usha’s central role

item.description: At least one person was killed after a chemical tank rupture in Washington state, with authorities saying there are people still unaccounted for. The incident happened on the border between Washington state and Oregon at a manufacturing plant.

media:content.media:title: At least one person dead after chemical tank rupture in Washington state
media:content.media:description: At least one person was killed after a chemical tank rupture in Washington state, with authorities saying there are people still unaccounted for. The incident happened on the border between Washington state and Oregon at a manufacturing plant.

item.title: At least one person dead after chemical tank rupture in Washington state

item.dc:creator: Justin Goldman
Laura Strickler
item.description: President Donald Trump’s social posts left a trail of confusion over the weekend as Iran negotiations continue.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Hosts Law Enforcement Leaders Dinner In The Rose Garden
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump in the Rose Garden at the White House on May 11.

item.title: Deal or no deal? Trump’s social media posts add confusion to Iran conflict

item.description: The U.S. men's national team unveiled its roster as the United States prepares to play co-host for the World Cup. Former USMNT Captain Carlos Bocanegra discusses the team's construction and what this World Cup means for soccer in America.

media:content.media:title: U.S. men's national team unveils World Cup roster
media:content.media:description: The U.S. men's national team unveiled its roster as the United States prepares to play co-host for the World Cup. Former USMNT Captain Carlos Bocanegra discusses the team's construction and what this World Cup means for soccer in America.

item.title: U.S. men's national team unveils World Cup roster

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
Pilar Melendez
item.description: Warning: This story includes spoilers for part one of the “Summer House” Season 10 reunion.

media:content.media:text: Kyle Cooke, Ciara Miller, Andy Cohen, Amanda Batula, West Wilson.
media:content.media:description: Kyle Cooke, Ciara Miller, Andy Cohen, Amanda Batula and West Wilson at the "Summer House" Season 10 reunion.

media:content.media:text: Ben Waddell, Bailey Taylor, Mia Calabrese, Lindsay Hubbard, Kyle Cooke, Ciara Miller, Andy Cohen, Amanda Batula, West Wilson, Carl Radke, Jesse Solomon, KJ Dillard and the "Summer House Reunion."
media:content.media:description: Kyle Cooke, Ciara Miller, Andy Cohen, Amanda Batula and West Wilson at the "Summer House" Season 10 reunion.

media:content.media:text: Amanda Batula, West Wilson.
media:content.media:description: Kyle Cooke, Ciara Miller, Andy Cohen, Amanda Batula and West Wilson at the "Summer House" Season 10 reunion.

item.title: Bravo’s messy ‘Summer House’ reunion becomes a can’t-miss event

item.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

media:content.media:title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
media:content.media:description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

item.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio

item.dc:creator: Phil Helsel
item.description: The remaining 16,000 residents of Garden Grove, California, were allowed to return home Tuesday, days after the threat of a catastrophic explosion at a chemical tank prompted fears of an environmental disaster.

media:content.media:text: A drone photo of an industrial yard surrounded by train tracks.
media:content.media:description: An aerial of water being sprayed on large storage tanks at the GKN Aerospace facility in Garden Grove, Calif., May 24, 2026.

item.title: All evacuation orders lifted after explosion at California chemical tank is averted

item.dc:creator: Gary Grumbach
Raquel Coronell Uribe
item.description: The former president is urging a judge to block the release of recordings and transcripts of his private conversations with the ghostwriter of his 2017 memoir.

media:content.media:text: Former President Joe Biden
media:content.media:description: Former President Joe Biden speaks at a fundraising event with the South Carolina Democratic Party at the Columbia Museum of Art in February.

item.title: Biden sues Justice Department to stop release of audio from interviews

item.dc:creator: Doha Madani
Pilar Melendez
item.description: Warning: This story includes spoilers for part one of the “Summer House” Season 10 reunion.

media:content.media:text: Kyle Cooke, Ciara Miller, Andy Cohen, Amanda Batula, West Wilson.

item.dc:creator: Owen Auston-Babcock
item.description: Former Rep. Colin Allred has unseated Rep. Julie Johnson.

media:content.media:description: Rep. Julie Johnson, D-Texas, lost her primary.

media:content.media:text: Fort Bend County Organizing Rally with Colin Allred
media:content.media:description: Rep. Julie Johnson, D-Texas, lost her primary.

item.title: Rep. Julie Johnson unseated in Texas Democratic primary by predecessor Colin Allred

item.dc:creator: Ben Kamisar
item.description: Democrat Johnny Garcia has won his party’s primary in Texas’ 35th Congressional District, NBC News projects, defeating a rival whom party leaders had condemned for antisemitic comments as Democrats look to compete in a district Republicans redrew to their benefit

media:content.media:text: Maureen Galindo and Johnny Garcia.
media:content.media:description: Texas Democratic House candidates Maureen Galindo and Johnny Garcia take part in a forum in San Antonio on May 6.

item.title: Democrat Johnny Garcia wins Texas House primary after rival’s antisemitic comments

item.dc:creator: Allan Smith
item.description: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani unveiled proposals to build 200,000 affordable housing units and preserve an additional 200,000 more over the next decade as part of a comprehensive housing plan that amounts to a substantial marker in the national debate on those issues.

media:content.media:text: Zohran Mamdani.
media:content.media:description: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani at City Hall on May 12.

item.title: Zohran Mamdani wades into housing debate with a plan that could define his time in office

item.dc:creator: Daniella Silva
item.description: Days of protests outside a New Jersey immigration detention center, including clashes with federal law enforcement, continued Tuesday as demonstrators and lawmakers allege the facility, where detainees waged a hunger strike, has inedible food and lacks access to medical care

media:content.media:text: Protesters, ICE agents clash outside Newark detention center
media:content.media:description: Federal immigration officers clash with protesters outside Delaney Hall in Newark, N.J., on May 25, 2026.

media:content.media:text: ICE agents and immigration activists clash outside Delaney Hall detention center in Newark, New Jersey
media:content.media:description: Federal immigration officers and activists face off outside Delaney Hall on Monday.

media:content.media:text: Immigration Advocates Demonstrate And Clash With Officers Outside Delaney Hall Detention Facility In Newark
media:content.media:description: Federal immigration officers stand in front of an armored vehicle Monday outside Delaney Hall.

media:content.media:text: Sen. Andy Kim
media:content.media:description: Sen. Andy Kim, D-N.J., second from right, tries to broker a de-escalation between ICE agents and immigration activists Monday outside Delaney Hall.

media:content.media:text: Immigration Advocates Demonstrate And Clash With Officers Outside Delaney Hall Detention Facility In Newark
media:content.media:description: An ICE agent uses pepper spray during a clash Monday with immigration activists outside Delaney Hall.

item.title: Expired food, neglected medical care and hunger strike allegations fuel protests at N.J. ICE facility

item.dc:creator: Sahil Kapur
item.description: John Cornyn was a loyal Republican soldier. There’s no disputing that Cornyn’s voting record was almost perfectly aligned with Trump. Ken Paxton’s lopsided victory captured an important reality of the GOP in 2026, too: That’s not enough.

media:content.media:text: Sen. Cornyn at a press meeting
media:content.media:description: U.S. Sen. John Cornyn, R-TX, in the Hart Senate Office Building on April 07, 2025 in Washington, DC.

item.title: John Cornyn undone by past Trump misgivings after decades as a loyal party man

item.dc:creator: Bridget Bowman
item.description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton has defeated Sen.

media:content.media:text: John Cornyn gesturing with both hands while standing at a lectern outdoors.
media:content.media:description: Sen. John Cornyn, R-Texas, speaks to reporters and supporters after voting at the Circle C Community Center in the Republican primary runoff election for the U.S. Senate seat in Austin, May 18, 2026. (Jay Janner/The Austin American-Statesman via Getty Images)

media:content.media:text: Ken Paxton standing on a stage in a darkened room with a microphone.
media:content.media:description: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton at a campaign rally in Allen last week.

item.title: Ken Paxton defeats GOP Sen. John Cornyn in Texas primary runoff

item.dc:creator: Owen Auston-Babcock
item.description: Freshman Rep. Christian Menefee defeated longtime Rep. Al Green in the Democratic primary runoff for Texas’ 18th Congressional District, NBC News projects, after a rare incumbent-on-incumbent matchup sparked by Republican-led redistricting efforts.

media:content.media:credit: Getty Images; CQ-Roll Call via Getty Images
media:content.media:text: A diptych image showing Rep. Christian Menefee, D-Texas, and Rep. Al Green, D-Texas.
media:content.media:description: A diptych image showing Rep. Christian Menefee, D-Texas, and Rep. Al Green, D-Texas.

item.title: Democratic Rep. Al Green unseated by Rep. Christian Menefee in primary with two incumbents

item.dc:creator: Kyla Guilfoil
item.description: President Donald Trump stressed the importance of establishing the CFTC’s authority over prediction markets and vowed to protect the cryptocurrency industry.

media:content.media:text: President Trump Visits Arlington National Cemetery On Memorial Day
media:content.media:description: President Donald Trump speaks at a Memorial Day ceremony with Vice President JD Vance and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth at Arlington National Cemetery in Arlington, Va.

item.title: Trump pledges to protect the crypto industry and ensure prediction markets ‘thrive’

item.dc:creator: Tim Stelloh
item.description: A Southern California man known for his patriotic and pro-Trump home decorations died after he was assaulted outside his house, authorities said
item.title: California man known for pro-Trump displays dies after assault outside his home

item.description: Vance spoke to NBC News in an interview that touched on Iran, Secretary of State Marco Rubio and the “anti-weaponization fund.”

item.description: Shop the best Home Depot Memorial Day sales on tools, appliances, and gardening supplies from Dewalt, Miracle-Gro and LG.

media:content.media:text: Home Depot is a great retailer to shop over Memorial Day weekend if you are looking for tools, home improvement and appliances.

item.title: The 49+ best Home Depot Memorial Day deals start at just $2

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Podiatrists say that Birkenstock Arizona sandals are some of the most comfortable shoes on the market thanks to the built-in arch support. Right now, get them for 40 percent off.

media:content.media:text: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.
media:content.media:description: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.

media:content.media:text: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.
media:content.media:description: Birkenstock Arizona sandals have a contoured footbed with built-in arch support for comfort.

item.title: Deal of the Day: Birkenstock Arizona sandals are 40% off

item.dc:creator: Harry Rabinowitz
item.description: Shop the best post-Memorial Day deals on mattresses, home appliances, beauty, tech and more from brands like Brooklinen, Ninja, Levoit, EltaMD and Apple.

media:content.media:text: Major discounts on tech, mattresses, kitchen gear and more are still available now.
media:content.media:description: Major discounts on tech, mattresses, kitchen gear and more are still available now.

media:content.media:text: Major discounts on tech, mattresses, kitchen gear and more are still available now.
media:content.media:description: Major discounts on tech, mattresses, kitchen gear and more are still available now.

item.title: The best Memorial Day sales have been extended beyond the weekend

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
item.description: The Ninja Creami is one of the best ice cream makers, but are there better options? I tested it against KitchenAid, Cuisinart Fast Freeze and more to find out.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy of Cory Fernandez and Zoe Malin
media:content.media:text: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:credit: Courtesy of Cory Fernandez and Zoe Malin
media:content.media:text: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The Ninja Creami on a granite table with the mixing paddle beside it.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: Cuisinart FastFreeze ice cream maker on a table.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: Light green KitchenAid Stand Mixer with ice cream maker attachment installed.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The Cuisinart Ice Cream Maker
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The GreenPan Frost sitting on a table with the lid beside it.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

media:content.media:text: The Nutribullet Chill Ice Cream Maker on a table.
media:content.media:description: The Ninja Creami is also available in a deluxe version, which makes more ice cream and has more pre-sets.

item.title: I tested the Ninja Creami against five popular competitors, and the results shocked me
